criteria.name: Cleaning Config
criteria.evidence: docs/cleaning-config.json exists with all required sections (value_ranges, fwi_output_ranges, cross_variable_checks, rate_of_change, flatline, enforcement). Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: enforce_quality() Function
criteria.evidence: quality.py implements enforce_quality() with config-driven enforcement actions. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Pipeline Integration
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py inserts enforce_quality() after resample, before impute. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: FWI Output Enforcement
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py calls enforce_fwi_outputs() after calculate_fwi(). Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Quality Enforcement Report
criteria.evidence: quality_enforcement_report.csv is generated and registered in manifest. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Manifest Registration
criteria.evidence: Quality enforcement report registered in pipeline_manifest.json. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Quality Flags Column
criteria.evidence: _quality_flags column added by enforce_quality(). Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: QA/QC Report Enhancement
criteria.evidence: Ralph added quality_enforced_count, quality_flagged_count, out_of_range_pre_enforcement, out_of_range_post_enforcement columns to generate_qa_qc_report(). Function now accepts optional quality_actions parameter. cleaning.py passes all_quality_actions. All 9 QA/QC tests pass.

criteria.name: Date Range Truncation
criteria.evidence: truncate_date_range() filters records before 2023-04-01. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Fast Test Suite Passes
criteria.evidence: Martin fixed all 4 test-design bugs in tests/test_quality_enforcement.py (commit b400629): (1) sample_hourly fixture now uses varying values (20.0 + 0.5*i etc.) so flatline detection does not trigger on clean data; (2) wind_speed_kmh list length matches DataFrame rows; (3) assertion uses 'flag_only' matching config; (4) NaN gap applied to all 3 flatline-monitored variables. All 63 quality enforcement + QA/QC tests pass. Full fast suite green.

criteria.name: No Out-of-Range FWI Inputs
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() runs before impute, setting out-of-range values to NaN. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Flatline Detection
criteria.evidence: Flatline detection uses config-driven flag_only action. Does not modify values. Verified by prior review.

summary: All 12 acceptance criteria PASS. Phase 8 data quality enforcement is complete. Martin's 4 test-design bugs in test_quality_enforcement.py were fixed in commit b400629 — the only remaining FAIL (AC-DQ-10) now passes. Production code was already correct; tests were the issue. Fast test suite is green.
